title: lilium brevistylum
intro: Lilium brevistylum, also known as the dwarf lilyturf or short-styled lilyturf, is a type of plant belonging to the lilyturf family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Lilium brevistylum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried rhizomes are sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine.
